title: pelargonium inodorum
intro: Pelargonium inodorum, also known as the scented leaf geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium inodorum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate digestive issues, such as nausea and stomach ulcers. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
